name: Image View
description: Display an image in the workflow.
doc:
Preview images directly in the workflow canvas.

Features:
• Inline image preview with adjustable height
• Pass-through output (doesn't modify the image)
• Works with base64 images and URLs

Usage:
Insert between image nodes to see intermediate results. Useful for debugging image processing pipelines.

Tip: Adjust max height to balance between preview size and canvas space.
